description_long: This is a modern four-door sedan with a streamlined, aerodynamic body and a smooth, glossy white exterior. The car features a gently sloping roofline, sculpted hood with subtle vents, and a rear deck with integrated taillights that span the width of the vehicle. Large, multi-spoke alloy wheels add a sporty touch, while the side mirrors are sleek and body-colored. The windows are tinted, and the door handles are flush with the body, contributing to the car's clean lines. The rear of the sedan is equipped with dual exhaust outlets and a subtle lip spoiler, while the front showcases a wide grille and aggressive headlight design.
description: A sleek, modern white sedan with sculpted body lines, large alloy wheels, and integrated front and rear lighting. The car has a sporty yet refined appearance with flush door handles and tinted windows.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the full-width taillight, dual exhaust outlets, and subtle rear spoiler.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four doors, large alloy wheels, and flush door handles.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the wide grille, aggressive headlights, and sculpted hood with vents.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the car's profile, wheels, and door arrangement.
attribute_wheel_design: Large, multi-spoke alloy wheels with a silver finish and thin, evenly spaced spokes.
